description_long: This is a fictional starfighter with a sleek, elongated fuselage and four distinct wings arranged in an X-formation, each equipped with a cylindrical engine and laser cannon at the tip. The body is primarily white with red and gray markings, showing signs of weathering and battle damage. The cockpit is forward-mounted, enclosed with a transparent canopy, and features a single seat, with a small astromech droid socketed behind it. The rear of the craft displays four prominent engine exhausts, and the wings are mid-mounted with a slight dihedral angle, lacking winglets. The tail section is minimal, with a single vertical stabilizer integrated into the fuselage. No visible landing gear is present, suggesting a retractable or fictional landing system.
description: A white and red starfighter with four X-shaped wings, forward cockpit, and four rear engines, featuring weathered surfaces and laser cannons on each wing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, forward cockpit canopy, and the symmetrical X-formation of the wings with laser cannons.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated fuselage, cockpit placement, and the stacked engine arrangement at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the four large engine exhausts, the X-wing configuration, and the astromech droid socket.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the fuselage profile, cockpit, and wing-mounted weaponry.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, X-configuration with four straight wings, each equipped with a laser cannon at the tip and a slight dihedral angle; no winglets present.
attribute_engine_type: Four cylindrical jet engines, one mounted at the base of each wing.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer integrated into the rear fuselage.
attribute_landing_gear_type: No visible landing gear; likely retractable or fictional landing system.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a transparent canopy and an astromech droid socket directly behind.
